b:Tc9c8,<div class="specification">
<p>The diagram shows some of the metabolic processes taking place in a plant cell.</p>
<p style="text-align: center;"><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Identify the process Y and state the name of the organelle where it takes place in a plant cell.</p>
<p>Process Y:</p>
<p>Name of the organelle:</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">a.i.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Identify the molecule Z.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">a.ii.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>State the type of reaction which converts excess monosaccharides to polysaccharides.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>The process X uses oxygen and produces ATP. Identify the process X.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Outline the uses of ATP in plant cells.</p>
<div class="marks">[2]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">d.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>With reference to the diagram, identify <strong>one</strong> example of catabolism.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">e.</div>
</div>c:T4f8,<div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>process Y: photosynthesis ✔</p>
<p>organelle: chloroplast ✔</p>
<p><em>Both needed</em>.</p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.i.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>glycerol /glycerin ✔</p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.ii.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>condensation/dehydration/synthesis/anabolic/anabolism ✔</p>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p><span style="text-decoration:underline;">aerobic</span> respiration ✔</p>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>a. used as an energy source ✔</p>
<p>b. supplies/releases energy for biochemical reactions ✔</p>
<p>c. photosynthesis/active transport/other verifiable example of reaction or process ✔</p>
<div class="question_part_label">d.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>a. (letter X) breakdown of monosaccharides/respiration ✔</p>
<p>b. (letter Y) hydrolysis/photolysis in photosynthesis/oxidation of water ✔</p>
<p><em>Answer must come from the diagram</em>.</p>
<div class="question_part_label">e.</div>
</div>d:T746,<div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>The diagram was generally confusing to candidates.</p>
<p>This was generally answered correctly.</p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.i.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>The diagram was generally confusing to candidates.</p>
<p>This was generally missed.</p>
<p> </p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.ii.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>The diagram was generally confusing to candidates.</p>
<p>This was often answered correctly.</p>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>The diagram was generally confusing to candidates.</p>
<p>Although many answered cell respiration, aerobic respiration was expected since the question defined aerobic respiration.</p>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>The diagram was generally confusing to candidates.</p>
<p>Expressing the nature of ATP in an outline of its use to plants was problematic for many students. Rather than a source of energy it was thought to be energy itself. Many processes use ATP in one part of the pathway or another, so a wide variety of seemingly contradictory answers received credit. For example, ATP is used in cell respiration during glycolysis. Credit was given for glycolysis as well as for respiration.</p>
<div class="question_part_label">d.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>The diagram was generally confusing to candidates.</p>
<p>Too often candidates did not make reference to the diagram when giving an example of catabolism. Some thought that ADP changing to ATP was catabolism. This probably comes from a failure to understand paired reactions.</p>
<div class="question_part_label">e.</div>
